message:
refactor(outcome): Centralize sentiment detection and remove unused param

- Remove unused _task parameter from outcomeCommand function
- Move sentiment detection (POSITIVE_PATTERNS, NEGATIVE_PATTERNS,
  detectSentiment) from commands/outcome.ts to outcome.ts
- Export detectSentiment from canonical location for reuse
- Re-export from commands/outcome.ts for backward compatibility
